message:
feat(fcp-host, fcp-async-core): add cache-aware discovery and async primitive tests

fcp-host/src/discovery.rs:
- Add DiscoveryQueryResult wrapping DiscoveryResponse with cache_hit
  metadata for observability-aware callers
- Add discover_with_metadata() returning full cache metadata alongside
  filtered connector summaries
- Refactor DiscoveryCache internals: CachedDiscovery now stores
  registry_version alongside connectors, get_or_refresh returns
  DiscoveryCacheResult with cache_hit flag
- Expand test coverage for cache hit/miss tracking, TTL expiry, and
  registry version propagation through the cache layer

fcp-host/src/bin/fcp-host.rs:
- Wire discover_with_metadata() into the host binary's discovery
  endpoint, logging cache hit/miss for operational visibility

fcp-host/tests/host_connector_integration.rs:
- Add integration tests validating the full discovery → cache →
  response pipeline with real connector registrations

fcp-async-core/src/lib.rs:
- Add Semaphore owned-permit tests (try_acquire_owned success/fail,
  acquire_owned async)
- Add mpsc channel tests (Sender::closed() notification, len/is_empty
  tracking, is_closed detection after receiver close)
- Add watch channel tests (borrow_and_update sequencing, has_changed
  detection, multiple-receiver fan-out)
- Add oneshot channel tests (send/recv, closed notification, error on
  double send)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
